name: corporate event teams managing 5–10 events/month tool
description: For corporate event teams processing 5–10 events/month, inefficient coordination causes late bookings and increased costs. We streamline event planning instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem_solved: Inefficient coordination of event logistics and venue bookings.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient coordination of event logistics and venue bookings.
